description: This is the first iteration of the proper wheelchair platform. The first wheelchair we used (given by a sponsoring company) was too heavy so we went for a regular and lighter chair.
Same first chair iteration but from another angle.
First video blog of the wheelchair platform working. One laptop was running the operation console and another one was running the actual X-Plane simulator itself.
Video of the moving platform. This time is a much lighter and simpler wheelchair.
Picture of the physical flight motion platform in development with the lighter wheelchair.
A video of the platform in development. This one shows the light wheelchair on top of the platform with a monitor of the simulation in front of it.
Picture of the flight motion platform on the RAeS trailer.
Picture of the control system for the platform. This one was mounted on the wall, mostly to save space and jazz up the room with a distinct whiff of engineering chique.
Motion platform trailer as viewed from the operator desk behind.
Picture of the motion platform loaded on the trailer. Behind you can see the projector and my supervisor standing by the operator's desk.
Picture of me standing next to cessna trainer airplane taken at the Blackbushe airport. This is where we met with the aerobility stakeholders to view the current state of the platform.
Video of my supervisor testing out the flight motion platform inside the trailer. As you can see the simulation was projected in front of the user.
Picture of the aircraft at Blackbushe airport where we met with stakeholders to discuss the current state of the trailer that housed the flight motion platform.
Me trying out some aviator raybans in preparation for RIAT (The big day!)
Us entering to RIAT.
Aircraft in formation during a RIAT airshow rehearsal.
Me with suit and aviator Raybans entering RIAT.
Quick video I took of some aircraft flying by as we entered RIAT.
Me posing with the RIAT exhibitor lanyard.
Another video of a jet flying by at RIAT (Can you tell I love aircraft?).
Typhoon aircraft doing some maneouvres on the RIAT setup day.
Typhoon aircraft doing some maneouvres on the RIAT setup day.
Typhoon aircraft doing some maneouvres on the RIAT setup day.
Typhoon aircraft doing some maneouvres on the RIAT setup day.
Typhoon aircraft doing some maneouvres on the RIAT setup day.
Big ol' Boeing cargo aircraft doing some unreal manouvres on the air during the setup day.
The same cargo aircraft doing an unreal loop-de-loop.
Another jet doing air-o-batics.
Picture of the trailer at RIAT during setup day.
Picture of a jet at RIAT.
Tornado IDS german fighter jet located in RIAT.
Me posing in front of a typhoon yet during RIAT.
Picture of a gulfstream yet parked at RIAT.
Video of a chinook flying by.
Panoramic view of SOME of the aircraft parked by at RIAT. When I said this was Europe's biggest airshow I was NOT kidding.
Pictue of what I believe to be a french spitfire (I could be wrong tbh).
A really cool video of a Chinook passing by and hooking onto an ATV.
Me posing if front of some fighter jets parked at RIAT.
I do not know what seaplane model this is but it's one of the coolest planes I have ever seen. The pinup lady's name is Miss pickup. So I assume that's the name of the plane.
Picture view from the terrace of the hotel we stayed in.
A video I filmed to myself after the setup day. I was tired yet pleased at how the journey turned out.
Me approaching an f35 that was right next to our trailer. That was a MACHINE right there. Truly a sight to behold.
Picture of me posing next to a lockheed marting f35.
Picture of the joystick mappings used in the platform.
Video of the functioning trailer platform as seen from the operator's console.
Trailer view from the outside. The TV on the side is meant to show a video feed of the inside of the trailer.
Video of two blackhawk helicopters flying by on the exhibition day.
Unveiling of the flight motion platform trailer at RIAT.
The trailer being opened for the first time to visitors.
Video of one of the first people to use the flight motion platform.
Video of a spitfire doing a barrel roll (My life is complete as of that day).
Video of a typhoon jet doing a stall manouvre.
Video of a typhoon jet doing a barrel roll.
Video of a gfighter jet flying around the RIAT airspace.
Video of me posing next to a spanish typhoon with an awesome tiger livery.
Picture of the spanish typhoon. It deserves it's own picture just based on how majestic it is.
Video of a puma 2 helicopter wizzing by.
Picture of a texan c47 'Ready 4 duty'.
Picture of a vietnam era army helicopter. It's smaller than it looks!
Another cool looking aircraft. I lost count at this point.
Picture of a big army cargo airplane. It was massive to stand next to!
Picture of me posing next ot and f35 fighter jet.
Some royal airforce trucks.
Picture of an raf ground vehicle.
Picture of the cargo airplane as viewed from the back.
Picture of the cargo airplane bay.
Picture of another (slightly bigger) flight simulator platform.
Close up picture of two chinook helicopters.
Picture of a VTOL aircraft at RIAT.
Prop airplane doing an insane divebomb.
More aircraft! Who would've guessed. One of them is painted like a black hawk.
Wide shot of the red arrows doing an awesome fly by.
The red arrows doing a show in all their glory!
The F35 doing an amazing vertical takeoff.
Video of an actual Nigerian pilot testing out our platform!
Video of Tim Peake testing out our platform.
Picture of me coming back from RIAT decked out in swag from other stands.
Picture of the team at the end of RIAT posing on the trailer.
Me posing on the platform trailer between two red arrows pilots.
A wideshot of a pirotechnics show that happened at RIAT. An unforgetable sight!
RAeS video of Tim Peake giving his feedback on the platform.
